args.sql: SELECT t1.teigid, t1.geom FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_gis.teig AS t1 INNER JOIN kvikkleire_87067f98e29a47d4901328f3a926a515.utlopomr AS t2 ON ST_Intersects(t1.geom, t2.omrade) WHERE t1.kommunenummer = '5001' ORDER BY t1.teigid ASC LIMIT 10
